mapper.sql: select a.ad_id, a.park_id, a.ad_title, a.ad_position, a.cover_url, a.link_type, a.link_url, a.merchant_id, a.sort_order, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.status, a.remark, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, p.name as park_name, m.merchant_name from biz_merchant_ad a left join ics_park p on a.park_id = p.id left join biz_merchant m on a.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
mapper.select: order by a.sort_order asc, a.create_time desc, a.ad_id desc
order by a.sort_order asc, a.create_time desc, a.ad_id desc

select count(1) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when a.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as onlineCount, coalesce(sum(case when a.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as offlineCount, coalesce(sum(case when a.start_time is not null and a.start_time > now() then 1 else 0 end), 0) as waitingCount from biz_merchant_ad a left join biz_merchant m on a.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
mapper.update: update biz_merchant_ad set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where ad_id = #{adId}
